lines: The Indiana Fever are 10-8, third in the Eastern Conference, and host the Los Angeles Sparks tomorrow at 8 PM.
The Indianapolis Indians lost 6-4 to the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders yesterday and will host them again tonight at 7:05 PM.
escape_hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Friday, June 26. Turkey beat United States 3 to 2 yesterday. The Indiana Fever are 10 to 8, third in the Eastern Conference, and host the Los Angeles Sparks tomorrow at 8 PM. The Indianapolis Indians lost 6 to 4 to the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders yesterday and will host them again tonight at 7:05 PM. And if it gets away from you, your out is: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
